metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			VALUES('DateTable'[Quarter]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'DateTable'[Quarter], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'DateTable'[Quarter]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			VALUES('PlanTypes'[PlanName]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'PlanTypes'[PlanName]

EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"MinDate", CALCULATE(MIN('DateTable'[Date])),
		"MaxDate", CALCULATE(MAX('DateTable'[Date]))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"RevenueImpact", IGNORE('DateTable'[RevenueImpact])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(__DS0FilterTable, __DS0FilterTable2, "UserLTV", IGNORE('DateTable'[UserLTV]))

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"AvgSubscriptionDuration", IGNORE('DateTable'[AvgSubscriptionDuration])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"ActiveSubscriptions", IGNORE('DateTable'[ActiveSubscriptions])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"ChurnRate_Basic", IGNORE('DateTable'[ChurnRate_Basic])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"ChurnRate_Basic", IGNORE('DateTable'[ChurnRate_Basic]),
		"ChurnRate_Premium", IGNORE('DateTable'[ChurnRate_Premium])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DateTable'[Month],
			'DateTable'[MonthName],
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('PlanTypes'[PlanName], "IsGrandTotalColumnTotal"),
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"ActiveSubscriptions", 'DateTable'[ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal] = FALSE)),
			"'DateTable'[Month]", 'DateTable'[Month],
			"'DateTable'[MonthName]", 'DateTable'[MonthName],
			"'PlanTypes'[PlanName]", 'PlanTypes'[PlanName],
			"ActiveSubscriptions", [ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0CoreTableByDM0 = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal] = TRUE)),
			"'DateTable'[Month]", 'DateTable'[Month],
			"'DateTable'[MonthName]", 'DateTable'[MonthName],
			"SortBy_DM0_0", [ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'DateTable'[Month], 'DateTable'[MonthName]),
			__DS0CoreTableByDM0
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			201,
			__DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns,
			[SortBy_DM0_0],
			0,
			'DateTable'[Month],
			1,
			'DateTable'[MonthName],
			1
		)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(62, __DS0SecondaryBase, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryWindowed,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				'PlanTypes'[PlanName],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0Secondary

ORDER BY
	'PlanTypes'[PlanName]

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[SortBy_DM0_0] DESC, 'DateTable'[Month], 'DateTable'[MonthName], [ColumnIndex]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q2"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'PlanTypes'[PlanName],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"ActiveSubscriptions", 'DateTable'[ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, [ActiveSubscriptions], 0, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[ActiveSubscriptions] DESC, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Q1"}, 'DateTable'[Quarter])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DateTable'[Month],
			'DateTable'[MonthName],
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('PlanTypes'[PlanName], "IsGrandTotalColumnTotal"),
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"ActiveSubscriptions", 'DateTable'[ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal] = FALSE)),
			"'DateTable'[Month]", 'DateTable'[Month],
			"'DateTable'[MonthName]", 'DateTable'[MonthName],
			"'PlanTypes'[PlanName]", 'PlanTypes'[PlanName],
			"ActiveSubscriptions", [ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0CoreTableByDM0 = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal] = TRUE)),
			"'DateTable'[Month]", 'DateTable'[Month],
			"'DateTable'[MonthName]", 'DateTable'[MonthName],
			"SortBy_DM0_0", [ActiveSubscriptions]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'DateTable'[Month], 'DateTable'[MonthName]),
			__DS0CoreTableByDM0
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			201,
			__DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns,
			[SortBy_DM0_0],
			0,
			'DateTable'[Month],
			1,
			'DateTable'[MonthName],
			1
		)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(62, __DS0SecondaryBase, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryWindowed,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				'PlanTypes'[PlanName],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0Secondary

ORDER BY
	'PlanTypes'[PlanName]

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[SortBy_DM0_0] DESC, 'DateTable'[Month], 'DateTable'[MonthName], [ColumnIndex]

		TREATAS({"Premium"}, 'PlanTypes'[PlanName])
